student.name: Siva Sai Varshith Mitta
student.bio: 2nd year Mathematics & Computing student at IIT Goa contributing to the OWASP BLT NetGuardian autonomous security scanning system and preparing a GSoC 2026 proposal.

project.title: BLT-NetGuardian Architecture Improvements
project.description: Improving the NetGuardian autonomous security scanning architecture, including persistent task deduplication, scanner result normalization, and extensible scanner registration mechanisms.
